title: Understanding and Implementing Custom Integrations in Monday.com
excerpt:
Hi everyone, 
I’m looking to dive deeper into custom integrations in Monday.com and would love to gather insights from the community. Below are some specific questions I have. If you’ve worked on integrations, your input…

posts.author: DariaMacewicz (Daria)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I’m looking to dive deeper into custom integrations in Monday.com and would love to gather insights from the community. Below are some specific questions I have. If you’ve worked on integrations, your input would be greatly appreciated!

Integration Levels

  1. Are integrations available at the platform level, or are they only tied to specific boards?

Custom Integration Experiences

  1. Are there any call-outs or lessons learned you’d like to share when setting up a custom integration?
  2. How long did it take to build, test, and go live with your integration? Could you share a bit about what was included in the build?

Managing Multiple Integrations

  1. Have you experienced challenges with multiple integrations connected to a board or across the platform?

Data Sync and API Limitations

  1. What are the data synchronization limits in Monday.com?
  • Are there any API call limits, data volume restrictions, or frequency limitations?

Error Handling

  1. What happens if an integration fails?
  • Are there error logs or notifications available to help with troubleshooting?

Performance and Latency

  1. Have you encountered any latency issues when using integrations?
  • How quickly do updates reflect across integrated systems?

Thank you in advance for sharing your expertise and experiences. Any tips, tricks, or considerations you have regarding custom integrations would be invaluable to those of us exploring these capabilities.

Looking forward to your thoughts!

Best,
Daria
